steps.title: Use the no-rain column
steps.content: The day is selected from the days with no rain, so the denominator is the total number of no-rain days: $64$. The favorable outcomes are weekend days with no rain: $16$.

steps.title: Find the conditional probability
steps.content: The probability is $$\frac{16}{64}=\frac{1}{4}$$ The answer is B.
